symptoms.symptom_name: Known Graves' disease with medication non-adherence

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Direct causative link via unregulated hormone excess.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hyperpyrexia, severe tachycardia, and severe agitation/hallucinations
New atrial fibrillation, goitre with bruit, tremor, hyperreflexia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clinician-only findings sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Known Graves' disease with medication cessation, hyperpyrexia, severe tachycardia, and delirium together confirm a life-threatening endocrine emergency.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Immediate 000 dispatch for IV beta-blockade, anti-thyroid drugs, and cooling
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Time-critical; thyroid storm carries high mortality without emergency treatment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: TSH, free T3/T4, blood cultures (in hospital)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms diagnosis and identifies infective trigger, but should not delay emergency dispatch.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Physically restraining the patient at home
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Struggling against restraint further increases heart rate and metabolic demand, risking cardiovascular collapse.
